name: the native enforcement records prose-judge as the detector so the universal semantic path is observable
command: printf '%s\n' 'rules:' '  - id: scraped-no-eval' '    description: "JavaScript code must never call eval() because it enables code injection"' '    severity: P0' '    mode: forbid' '    applies: "*.js"' '    token: "eval("' '    enforced_by: [{tool: semgrep}]' > x.yaml && printf 'const r = eval(userInput);\n' > app.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file app.js --extra-rules x.yaml >/dev/null 2>e.txt; grep -q 'detector=prose-judge.sh verdict=fail' e.txt && echo semantic-path-observable 1>&2
